prompt: Query "xpose-news-channel".article_candidates for the drafted rows (status='drafted', ORDER BY inserted_at ASC, LIMIT 5). For each result, read its markdown file in xpose-news-channel/drafts/ (filenames are in the manifest). Run your QA checklist, noting any issues, and if a draft passes, insert it into public.posts and update the candidate status to 'published'; otherwise update the status to 'rejected' with reasons. Log the outcomes in memory/2026-03-14.md and report which drafts were published or rejected.
